subcodes.first_line: O loving son of the renowned Isfandiyar, they tell how his body was invulnerable, such that neither arrow nor sword could pierce it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پور مهربان اسفندیار نامدار گویند رواین تن بود یعنی تیر و تیغ در او اثر
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @love of God
